settings.hero_heading: Born from a belief that skin deserves better.
settings.hero_body: We spent two years formulating before releasing a single product. No shortcuts. No compromises on what goes on your skin.
settings.mission_statement: Effective skincare shouldn't require a chemistry degree to understand — or a compromise on what goes on your skin.
settings.founder_heading: We started asking why not better?
settings.founder_note_1: Velour Skin was founded in 2021 after years of frustration with skincare that promised everything and delivered very little. Most products were either clinically effective but harsh, or gentle but completely useless.
settings.founder_note_2: We spent two years with cosmetic chemists, dermatologists, and botanists before formulating our first serum. Every ingredient has a reason. Every concentration has been tested. No filler. No fragrance. No compromise.
settings.footprint_body: We hold ourselves to a higher standard — recycled glass packaging, carbon-neutral shipping, and certified sustainable ingredient sourcing at every stage of production. Our manufacturing facility runs on 100% renewable energy.
settings.quote_text: Skin is not a surface to be fixed. It is a living system to be understood.
settings.cta_heading: Find your serum in under 60 seconds.
settings.cta_body: Answer five simple questions and we'll build a routine tailored to your skin goals, type, and lifestyle.

settings.title: Transparency
settings.description: We publish full INCI ingredient lists, concentration ranges, and clinical study references for every formula. No proprietary blends, no hidden actives.

settings.title: Efficacy first
settings.description: Every ingredient earns its place by demonstrated clinical effect, not cost, trend, or marketing value. If the evidence isn't there, neither is the ingredient.

settings.title: Sustainability
settings.description: Recyclable glass packaging, carbon-neutral shipping, and certified sustainable sourcing across our supply chain. We do the hard work so you don't have to.

settings.title: Simplicity
settings.description: Fewer, better products. A complete routine shouldn't require twelve steps. Our range is designed to work together and cover every primary skin concern.

settings.label: Recycled glass packaging across our range
Synthetic fragrances or essential oils in any formula
Formulation and testing before our first product launched
Targeted serums, each addressing a primary skin concern

settings.title: Start with the evidence
settings.description: Every active ingredient is selected based on peer-reviewed clinical evidence. We look at the study design, the concentration used, the subject population, and the outcomes measured — not just whether the headline sounds impressive.

settings.title: Formulate for real skin
settings.description: We work with a team of dermatologists and cosmetic chemists who have spent decades on clinical formulation. Real-world testing on diverse skin types is non-negotiable — no formula ships without it.

settings.title: Tell you exactly what's in it
settings.description: Full ingredient transparency isn't a marketing position for us — it's how we hold ourselves accountable. We publish INCI names, concentration ranges, and the clinical rationale for every active we use.
